_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in leveraging and optimizing resources required to complete AI projects and programs.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-002 (AG, cosine: 0.623), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.619).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.660). Shared vocabulary: [ai, skill]. DCWF-only terms [complete, leveraging, optimizing, programs, projects, required] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, building, career, data, design, developing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.913, R=0.869). P exceeds R by 0.044 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in leveraging and optimizing resources required to complete AI projects an" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.659 ≈ STS 0.660 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [ai, skill]. DCWF-only: [complete, leveraging, optimizing, programs, projects, required]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, building, career, data, design, developing].
